name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi
tagline: ₹6,000/year direct income support to small & marginal farmers
benefitAmount: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each, directly into bank account
description: ₹6,000/year direct income support to small & marginal farmers
applicationSteps: Visit pmkisan.gov.in or nearest CSC center
Click 'Farmers Corner' → 'New Farmer Registration'
Enter Aadhaar number, select State & District
Fill in personal, bank, and land details
Upload documents (land records, Aadhaar, bank passbook)
Submit & note your registration number
Visit local Patwari/Tehsildar office to verify land records
Check status at pmkisan.gov.in using Aadhaar or mobile number

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
tagline: Comprehensive crop insurance against natural calamities at minimal premium
benefitAmount: Insurance coverage for crop losses due to natural calamities, pests, diseases
description: Comprehensive crop insurance against natural calamities at minimal premium
applicationSteps: Visit pmfby.gov.in or contact nearest bank/insurance company
Non-loanee farmers: visit bank branch or CSC and fill Form-A
Loanee farmers: automatically enrolled; verify at bank
Submit Aadhaar, bank passbook, land records, and sowing certificate
Pay your share of premium (2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi)
Collect acknowledgment/policy document
In case of crop loss: notify within 72 hours via helpline 14447
Claims settled directly into bank account after survey

name: Kisan Credit Card
tagline: Flexible revolving credit for farm inputs, post-harvest, and allied activities
benefitAmount: Credit up to ₹3 lakh at 4% interest per annum with government interest subvention
description: Flexible revolving credit for farm inputs, post-harvest, and allied activities
applicationSteps: Visit nearest bank branch (SBI, cooperative bank, RRB, etc.)
Fill KCC application form with land details and crop plan
Submit Aadhaar, PAN/Voter ID, land records, passport photo
Bank assesses credit limit based on land holding and crop pattern
Credit limit sanctioned — usually within 2 weeks
Receive RuPay-enabled KCC debit card
Withdraw as needed during cropping season
Repay after harvest; limit renews every year

name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
tagline: 'Har Khet Ko Pani, More Crop Per Drop' — water to every farm field
benefitAmount: Subsidy on drip & sprinkler irrigation, water harvesting structures, and field channels
description: Water to every farm field with micro-irrigation and conservation support
applicationSteps: Visit State Agriculture Dept or PMKSY portal: pmksy.gov.in
Register on MIS portal and fill application form
Select component: AIBP, HAR KHET KO PANI, or PER DROP MORE CROP
Submit land records, Aadhaar, bank details, and layout plan
Get technical approval from agriculture dept/district officer
Purchase equipment from empanelled suppliers (get quotations)
Install irrigation system and submit completion report
Subsidy released directly into your bank account after inspection

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
tagline: Free soil testing and personalized fertilizer recommendations for every farm
benefitAmount: Free soil health card with crop-wise fertilizer recommendations; reduces input cost
description: Free soil testing and fertilizer recommendations for every farm
applicationSteps: Contact your local Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) or Block Agriculture Officer
Soil sample collected from your field by government soil testing officer
Sample tested at Soil Testing Laboratory
Card issued within 30–60 days: visit soilhealth.dac.gov.in
Log in with mobile number to download your Soil Health Card
Follow fertilizer and lime/gypsum recommendations on the card
Re-test soil every 2 years to track improvement

name: National Agriculture Market
tagline: Online trading platform connecting farmers directly to national buyers
benefitAmount: Better price discovery; sell produce online across state APMCs; lower commission
description: Online trading platform connecting farmers directly to national buyers
applicationSteps: Visit enam.gov.in and click 'Register as Farmer'
Enter Aadhaar, mobile number, state, mandi details
Provide bank account details for direct payment
Visit your local eNAM-linked APMC with produce
Grade and assay your produce at the mandi
Lot created; bidding starts online among registered traders
Accept best bid; payment credited to your bank account
Download e-payment receipt from enam.gov.in

name: PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
tagline: ₹3,000/month guaranteed pension for small & marginal farmers after age 60
benefitAmount: Minimum monthly pension of ₹3,000 after age 60
description: ₹3,000/month guaranteed pension for small & marginal farmers after age 60
applicationSteps: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) or pmkmy.gov.in
Carry Aadhaar, bank passbook, and mobile number
CSC operator fills enrollment form with your details
Choose auto-debit mode from savings bank account
Pay first monthly contribution at the CSC
Receive acknowledgment slip with unique pension account number
Track pension account on maandhan.in portal
Pension begins automatically in bank account after age 60

name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
tagline: Low-interest loans for post-harvest infrastructure and community farming assets
benefitAmount: Loans at 3% interest subvention; credit guarantee coverage up to ₹2 crore
description: Low-interest loans for post-harvest infrastructure and community farming assets
applicationSteps: Visit agriinfra.dac.gov.in and register
Select project type (cold storage, warehouse, pack house, etc.)
Prepare Detailed Project Report (DPR) with cost estimates
Apply online through the portal — select your preferred lending institution
Bank processes application and conducts site visit
Loan sanctioned with automatic 3% interest subvention
Credit guarantee applied if required
Funds disbursed in tranches linked to project progress

name: PM Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan
nameHindi: PM Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan
tagline: Solar pumps and grid-connected solar power plants for farmers
benefitAmount: 60–90% subsidy on solar water pumps; additional income from selling surplus power
source: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE)
description: Solar pumps and grid-connected solar power plants for farmers
applicationSteps: Visit mnre.gov.in or contact State Nodal Agency
Register on state portal and select component (A, B, or C)
Apply with land documents, Aadhaar, and electricity bill
State agency approves application and empanels vendor
Select empanelled vendor; pay your contribution
Vendor installs solar pump
DISCOM connects surplus power agreement if opting for sale
Regular maintenance provided by vendor as per guidelines

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
tagline: Financial support and certification for organic farming clusters
benefitAmount: ₹50,000/hectare over 3 years; free certification and market linkage
description: Financial support and certification for organic farming clusters
applicationSteps: Contact Block Agriculture Officer or KVK about PKVY clusters
Form a cluster of 20–50 farmers in your village
Elect cluster coordinator; all members stop chemical inputs
Apply through district agriculture officer with cluster details
Undergo PGS inspection and maintain organic records
Receive support for inputs/certification/market linkage as applicable
After transition, get organic certificate and sell at premium price

name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanisation
tagline: 40–80% subsidy on farm machinery and equipment for small/marginal farmers
benefitAmount: Subsidy on tractors, power tillers, harvesters, dryers, threshers, and equipment
description: Subsidy on farm machinery and equipment for small/marginal farmers
applicationSteps: Visit agrimachinery.nic.in and register as farmer
Select state, district, and equipment category
Choose implement from approved list
Purchase from approved dealer and collect receipt
Upload invoice and documents on portal
Verification by District Agriculture Officer
Subsidy transferred to bank account

name: Interest Subvention Scheme
tagline: Short-term crop loans at 4% effective interest for prompt repayment
benefitAmount: Crop loans up to ₹3 lakh at 4% effective interest for prompt repayment
description: Short-term crop loans at 4% effective interest for prompt repayment
applicationSteps: Apply for KCC or short-term crop loan at a scheduled bank
Loan sanctioned at normal rate as per bank
Government subvention applied automatically
Repay before due date to get prompt repayment incentive
Effective interest paid by you becomes lower (as notified)

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
tagline: Grants and funding for agri-innovation, startups, FPOs, and infrastructure
benefitAmount: Grants up to ₹25 lakh for agri-startups; funding for state agri projects
description: Grants and funding for agri-innovation, startups, FPOs, and infrastructure
applicationSteps: For startups: apply through rkvy.nic.in with business plan
For farmers/FPOs: approach District Agriculture Officer with proposal
State committee reviews and sanctions
Funds released based on progress and compliance

name: National Livestock Mission
tagline: Entrepreneurship development and risk coverage for animal husbandry farmers
benefitAmount: 50% subsidy for setting up livestock enterprises; breed improvement support
source: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry & Dairying
description: Support for livestock enterprises and risk management
applicationSteps: Visit nlm.udyamimitra.in or contact District Animal Husbandry Dept
Select enterprise type and prepare project report
Apply online with documents and bank details
District committee reviews and sanctions
Set up enterprise and claim subsidy after verification
For insurance: contact empanelled insurance company with livestock details

name: Agricultural Export Policy
tagline: Support for farmers and clusters to export agricultural produce globally
benefitAmount: Financial assistance for certification, market development, and export infrastructure
description: Support for certification, market development, and export infrastructure
applicationSteps: Register as member on apeda.gov.in (mandatory for export of scheduled products)
Get GlobalGAP or India GAP certification for your cluster
Apply to APEDA for market development assistance scheme
Participate in trade fairs and buyer-seller meets
Use approved pack house/cold chain for consignment
Submit shipping documents for reimbursement of financial assistance
